changes: Gate desktop prod promotion on blessed release metadata, with bless-release.sh orchestration and admin Releases blessed column
Fixed conversation search failing when backend search results used the search index shape instead of the normal conversation row shape
Fixed the Home ask bar showing a send button for attachment-only input that silently did nothing
Redesigned Home: ask omi directly from a new chat bar (chat slides in on the same page), suggested questions under the bar, and data connections tucked behind a Connect button

Omi now installs itself to Applications when launched from the downloaded disk image, fixing screen-recording permissions that wouldn't stick and the installer window reappearing after onboarding restarts; the onboarding language step also retries transient save failures instead of immediately showing a connection error
